urdu transliteration text:
Rozay Pe MUSTAFA(SAWA) Ke,Udaasi Si Chaayi HaiSadness prevails in the shrine of Prophet Muhammad (saw)English Transliteration
@HujjatELC

Rozay Pe MUSTAFA(SAWA) Ke,Udaasi Si Chaayi HaiKunbe Ko Khooke ZAINAB(ASWS) E Nashaaad Aayi Hai
@HujjatELC
english translation text: Sadness prevails in the shrine of Prophet Muhammad (saw),Zainab has arrived after losing her family

urdu transliteration text:
Arey Rokar Pukaari Nana Mai....Faryaad Laayi HuMai Chodkar HUSSAIN(ASWS) Ko Jungle Mai Aayi Hu
@HujjatELC

english translation text:
Grief and anguish surrounded us wherever we went,
We were denied refuge in the House of Allah,
My brother left the city and made his way to the desert

urdu transliteration text:
Nana Hamaare Ghar Ka Sab Asbaab Lut Gaya...Nana Hamaare Sar Pe Na Baaki Rahi RidaaNana Hazaar Tarha Jafa Ki Laeeno Ne..Khaimo Mai Haaye Aag Laga Di Laeeno Ne
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
O Grandfather, we were looted of our belongings,
Grandfather, our veils were snatched,
Grandfather, the cursed people tormented us in a hundred ways,
Our camps were set ablaze

O Grandfather, all the companions of my brother were martyred one by one,
Grandfather, it was like the Day of Judgement in Karbala,

O Grandfather, the soil of Karbala turned red,
The body of Qasim was mutilated by horses hooves,
And he left my brother in dismay

Nana Aseer Baara The Aur Ek Thi Rasan..Baandhe Gaye The Misl E Gunaah Gaar Khas Tatan...Nana Ham Apne Haal Pe Rote The Baar Baar..Nana Hamaare Haal Pe Haste The Bad Sheyaar.
O Grandfather, there were twelve prisoners and only one rope to tie them,
We were tied together as if we were sinners,
We used to weep at our state,
But the scoundrels used to laugh at us

urdu transliteration text:
Nana Tabaa Hoke Hum Aaye Hai Shaam Se...Bali SAKINA(ASWS) Kho Ke Hum Aaye Hai Shaam Se...Ab Tak Hai Neel Rassi Ke Shaano Ko Dekhlo..Nana Hamaare Tan Pe Nishaano Ko Dekhlo
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
O Grandfather, we have returned from Shaam, utterly devastated,
And we have lost Sakina as well,
You can still see the bruises of ropes on our shoulders,
See the scars on our body
O grandfather,

Zainab mourned at the grave of the Prophet (saw),
The shrine of the King of the world was shaken,
Even the sky and earth are crying over    this tragedy

One of the men of Shaam committed a sacrilege,
He wanted to take a lady of the Ahlul bayt as a slave,
We endured it all with patience
